commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review remains because the trusted-runner policy and required workflow_dispatch proof need maintainer/contributor action; the exe.dev skip gap is repairable but not the only blocker.; Needs attention: The main security concern is the free-form runner label on a workflow that can receive provider credentials and SSH key material.; Review finding: [P1] Constrain the secret-bearing runner label — .github/w... (sha=223691d79eba6fe9f55a14ac9b99da719bc1dfde)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a manual workflow_dispatch Live Provider E2E GitHub Actions matrix, a provider smoke helper script, and docs for maintainer-run provider smoke tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings from source inspection: the workflow uses inputs.runner_label for a secret-bearing job, and the exe.dev preflight only checks for ssh while current docs/backend require authenticated ssh exe.dev control-host access. I did not run live provider resources.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review remains because the trusted-runner policy and required workflow_dispatch proof need maintainer/contributor action; the exe.dev skip gap is repairable but not the only blocker.

target.title: [codex] add live provider E2E workflow
target.body:
## Summary

- add a manual `Live Provider E2E` GitHub Actions workflow that expands a selected provider list into one smoke job per built-in provider
- add `scripts/live-provider-e2e.sh` to run fast provider-specific smoke checks, skip missing secret/tool setup when requested, and clean up leases where supported
- document the maintainer secret checklist and workflow controls in `docs/features/live-provider-e2e.md`

## Notes

The workflow is `workflow_dispatch` only, defaults to `allow_missing=true`, and does not expose provider secrets to pull request jobs. Maintainers can switch `allow_missing=false` once the selected provider secrets are expected to be present.

Some providers still require a runner-side CLI or provider-side resource that cannot be represented as a GitHub secret, such as `devbox`, `sprite`, an existing Railway service, or a self-hosted Parallels host. Those requirements are called out in the doc.

## Verification

- `bash -n scripts/live-provider-e2e.sh`
- `ruby -e 'require "yaml"; YAML.load_file(".github/workflows/live-provider-e2e.yml"); puts "workflow yaml ok"'`
- `go build -trimpath -o /tmp/crabbox-provider-e2e ./cmd/crabbox`
- `node scripts/check-docs-links.mjs`
- `CRABBOX_LIVE=1 CRABBOX_LIVE_SKIP_MISSING=1 CRABBOX_BIN=/tmp/crabbox-provider-e2e scripts/live-provider-e2e.sh aws`
- `CRABBOX_LIVE=1 CRABBOX_LIVE_SKIP_MISSING=1 CRABBOX_BIN=/tmp/crabbox-provider-e2e scripts/live-provider-e2e.sh e2b`
target.author: zozo123

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
